name: Kidney Bean Salad
recipeIngredient: 16 oz (1 can) kidney beans, rinsed well
16 oz (1 can) pinto beans, rinsed well
1 egg white, hard-cooked and chopped finely
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the kidney beans (or pinto beans), celery, dill pickle, onion, and egg white together lightly.
2. Arrange the mixture on lettuce leaves.
3. Top each serving with a spoonful of dressing.
Food Exchanges per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1/2 FAT EXCHANGE
CAL: 99; CHO: 15g; PRO: 5g; SOD: 200mg; FAT: 3g
